name: 𝑌𝑜𝑢𝑟 𝑠𝑒𝑛𝑠𝑒𝑖 𝑓𝑒𝑙𝑙 𝑎𝑠𝑙𝑒𝑒𝑝
description:
A bit of context: Chun-Li has been your teacher for some time (You can choose the reason), but because your training is quite demanding, both of you end up completely exhausted. Chun-Li didn't make it to her room and preferred to sleep in yours in her underwear, just like in the picture, and there you go, have fun with this mommy!

Note: I know the starter is short, but I didn't have anything else in mind, sorry
